name: @vibe-engineer/context
description: Strict typed context graph, index, drift, and retrieval contracts for vibe-engineer.

scripts.test: node tests/real-boundary-witness.mjs && node tests/negative-witness.mjs && node tests/schema-strictness-witness.mjs
scripts.build: node --check src/index.js && node --check tests/real-boundary-witness.mjs && node --check tests/negative-witness.mjs && node --check tests/schema-strictness-witness.mjs && node tests/real-boundary-witness.mjs && node tests/negative-witness.mjs && node tests/schema-strictness-witness.mjs
scripts.typecheck: node --check src/index.js && node --check tests/real-boundary-witness.mjs && node --check tests/negative-witness.mjs && node --check tests/schema-strictness-witness.mjs
